reasoning: Given the short timeline to the end of 2025, it is unlikely that AI will have definitively reached the level of a 'generally educated human' in a way that satisfies a majority on a Manifold community poll. Although models like GPT-5 or equivalent from Anthropic will be highly capable, the goalposts for AGI are notoriously strict; respondents typically demand strong agentic capabilities, continuous learning, and high reliability across all domains. Community consensus (e.g., Metaculus) usually places comprehensive AGI further out, around 2027-2032. Therefore, a YES resolution by December 2025 remains quite improbable.
